subject: lsj trails
body:
thanks for the file... Unfortunately a great deal of
the work is silly... TO lay out interesting trails,
and or paths that don't take into account the views or
things of interest, I realize must be done on site...I
can see that no photos were consulted during the map
layout... ,, for instance,, It is easy to simply think
of the blue already existing roads as a trail,, but
they are  clearly not right.. they were laid out with
a bulldozer, and no guidance... to have the path pass
through the garbage dump,, is probably an oversight ,
or have a path straight up a hill, towards the new
library, where the only thing you see is tthe dirt in
front of you,, needs much more thought..sitechbacks in
the middle of the hill, needs re thinking, as  Trails
need interest to draw you around the next bend, or
curve, loops to come back quickly , in case you get
tired, and rest areas out of the sun.. I'm flying down
to the island tonight so as to be able to be on site 

__________________________________________________
